text_en: Hurl a mote of fire at a creature or object.
A frigid beam of blue-white light; on a hit the target's speed drops by 10 ft.
Lightning springs from your hand; advantage if the target wears metal armor.
A beam of crackling energy streaks toward a creature.
higher_level: Two beams at 5th, three at 11th, four at 17th

text_en: Flame-like radiance descends; the target gets no benefit from cover.
Insults laced with enchantment; on a failed save the target has disadvantage on its next attack.
Touch a willing creature; it adds 1d4 to one ability check of its choice.
A spectral hand manipulates objects within range.
An object sheds bright light in a 20-ft radius.
A minor magical trick: sensory effects, cleaning, sparks, and the like.
Three darts of force each hit automatically for 1d4+1 force damage.
higher_level: One extra dart per slot level above 1st

text_en: A touched creature regains hit points equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting modifier.
A creature you can see regains 1d4 + your spellcasting modifier hit points.
An invisible barrier grants +5 AC until your next turn, including against the triggering attack.
A willing unarmored target's base AC becomes 13 + its Dexterity modifier.
A thin sheet of flames shoots from your fingertips in a 15-ft cone.
A wave of thunderous force sweeps out in a 15-ft cube, pushing creatures on a failed save.
Up to three creatures add 1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws.
higher_level: One extra target per slot level above 1st

text_en: A flash of light strikes a creature; the next attack against it has advantage.
Sense the presence of magic within 30 ft and learn its school.
Teleport up to 30 ft to an unoccupied space you can see.
Three rays of fire; make a separate attack for each.
higher_level: One extra ray per slot level above 2nd

text_en: Paralyze a humanoid on a failed save; it repeats the save each turn.
material: a small straight piece of iron
higher_level: One extra target per slot level above 2nd

text_en: A touched creature turns invisible until it attacks or casts a spell.
higher_level: One extra target per slot level above 2nd

text_en: A floating spectral weapon attacks for 1d8 + your modifier force damage.
End one disease or the blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned condition.
A bright streak blossoms into a 20-ft-radius explosion of flame.
text_uk: Яскравий спалах вибухає полум'ям у радіусі 20 фт.
material: a tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur

text_en: Interrupt a creature in the process of casting a spell.
A stroke of lightning forms a 100-ft line, 5 ft wide.
material: a bit of fur and a glass rod

text_en: A touched creature gains a flying speed of 60 ft.
higher_level: One extra target per slot level above 3rd

text_en: A target gains +2 AC, advantage on Dex saves, doubled speed, and an extra action.
Return a creature dead no longer than 1 minute to life with 1 hit point.
Spectral guardians flit around you in a 15-ft radius, slowing and harming foes.
End spells on a target; higher-level spells need an ability check.
Transform a creature into a new beast form on a failed save.
Teleport yourself and one willing creature up to 500 ft.
A creature is invisible even while attacking or casting.
Send a creature to another plane on a failed save.
material: an item distasteful to the target
higher_level: One extra target per slot level above 4th

text_en: A blast of cold air erupts from your hands in a 60-ft cone.
material: a small crystal or glass cone

text_en: Paralyze any creature (not undead) on a failed save.
higher_level: One extra target per slot level above 5th

text_en: Return a creature dead up to 10 days to life with penalties that fade.
An invisible wall of force springs into existence, nearly indestructible.
material: a pinch of powder from a clear gem

text_en: A thin green ray reduces a creature to dust on a failed save.
material: a lodestone and a pinch of dust

text_en: A bolt of lightning leaps from a primary target to up to three others.
material: bits of fur and a silver pin
higher_level: One extra target per slot level above 6th

text_en: Negative energy wracks a creature; a humanoid slain by it rises as a zombie.
Instantly transport yourself and up to eight willing creatures a great distance.
Stun a creature with 150 hit points or fewer; no save.
Brilliant sunlight flashes in a 60-ft radius, blinding and burning.
material: fire and a piece of sunstone

text_en: The mightiest spell: duplicate any 8th-level-or-lower spell, or alter reality.
A word of power instantly kills a creature with 100 hit points or fewer.
Blazing orbs plummet, each exploding in a 40-ft-radius sphere.
Restore a creature dead up to 200 years to full life, even from nothing.
material: holy water and diamonds worth 25000 gp (consumed)
